title: Vestian is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Vestian is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Vestian in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vestian:
Vestian is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vestian!
